entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary crop studied, specifically cultivated varieties and resistant lines.

entities.name: SHEATH BLIGHT
entities.description: A severe disease affecting rice, causing significant yield losses.

entities.name: RHIZOCTONIA SOLANI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes sheath blight in rice.

entities.name: TROPICAL AND TEMPERATE REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas where sheath blight severely affects rice production.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: An environmental factor contributing to the challenges of managing sheath blight.

entities.name: SHEATH BLIGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of rice genotypes to resist infection by Rhizoctonia solani.

entities.name: PAU-SHB8
entities.description: A moderately resistant rice line used as a source for resistance QTLs.

entities.name: PR-121
entities.description: A susceptible cultivated rice variety used for the transfer of resistance QTLs.

entities.name: DISEASE SCORE
entities.description: A quantitative measure used to assess the severity of sheath blight infection.

entities.name: RELATIVE LESION HEIGHT (RLH)
entities.description: A phenotypic measure used to quantify the extent of sheath blight lesions.

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The molecular technique used to identify genomic regions associated with specific traits.

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphism markers used to facilitate QTL mapping.

entities.name: QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with sheath blight resistance and related traits.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 12
entities.description: A specific rice chromosome harboring a cluster of QTLs for RLH, lesion height, and disease score.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 8
entities.description: A specific rice chromosome exhibiting a major QTL for RLH.

entities.name: LESION HEIGHT
entities.description: A physical measurement of the disease lesion on the plant.

entities.name: LEUCINE-RICH REPEAT PROTEINS
entities.description: Candidate genes identified as being related to sheath blight resistance.

entities.name: CALCIUM/CALMODULIN-DEPENDENT PROTEIN KINASES
entities.description: Candidate genes identified as being related to sheath blight resistance.

entities.name: GENOTYPES 7168, 7183, AND 7152
entities.description: Promising backcross inbred lines demonstrating moderate resistance and favorable agronomic traits.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: General agricultural characteristics of the rice genotypes.
